mano_cua.result_summary: v-auth指令本身不添加addEventListener，只通过DOM操作(移除元素)控制权限，因此无法验证事件监听器清理场景。由于keep-alive，按钮在路由切换后是同一DOM元素，监听器数量未异常增加。另发现v-copy指令的beforeUnmount清理可能有bug(el.handleClick引用丢失)
mano_cua.last_reasoning: v-auth directive does NOT add event listeners - it only removes elements from DOM for permission control. The v-auth buttons had 2 listeners (1 Vue @click + 1 monitoring script), no extra from v-auth. Due to keep-alive, buttons are same DOM elements after route switch. v-copy directive has a potential cleanup bug.
